title: Spain rejects proposal to lower drink-driving limit
summary: Several Spanish political parties have rejected a proposal to lower the drink-driving limit in Spain, with the ruling Socialists accusing the PP and Vox of "bowing to the beer and wine lobbies".

title: Five things to know about the Galician language
summary: You may have visited Galicia, but what do you know about the Spanish region's unique language? Here are five things to know about Galician or Galego.

title: How a female teacher campaigned for Spain to have a Father's Day
summary: Today marks Father’s Day in Spain, the day when children all over the country come home with handmade crafts and often enjoy a special meal with their dads. But what are the origins of this day in Spain and why is it celebrated on March 19th?

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Sánchez announces €1 billion for Ukraine, train delays in Spain triple since 2019, one in three Spanish tenants fear rent rises in near future and more news from Spain on Thursday 19th March.

title: Can I be registered on the padrón in two places in Spain?
summary: Is it possible to register with two different town halls in Spain or can you live in one place and be registered in another? Here's what you need to know about having a padrón in two places.

title: The essential A to Z guide to bureaucracy in Spain
